title: Intensely Flavored Brazilian Beef Stew
description: A pungent, lacto-vegetarian-friendly stew from Brazil featuring orange juice and a braise. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Add the beef and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove the beef from the pot and set it aside. Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until it is softened, about 5 minutes. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute. Add the sliced beef back into the pot. Add 1 cup of orange juice, 1 cup of beef broth, and 1 tablespoon of tomato paste to the pot. Stir to combine. Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover the pot and transfer it to the oven. Braise the stew in a preheated oven at 300°F (150°C) for 2 hours, or until the beef is tender. Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly.
